subject: LSJ update
body:
LSJ radar looks to be improving at this time,,,not  perfect but good,,,most 
heavy rain is south of St. Thomas by 200 miles...moving  to west.
wind out of east 12 mph,,,increasing to 25 mph by  1pm...
this is 930pm radar imagine Friday  night.

fuel-efficient used cars.      (http://autos.aol.com/used?ncid=aolaut00050000000007)
